brand_voice.style: Short punchy headlines, conversational body copy

sections.headline: Don't type, just speak
sections.subheadline: The voice-to-text AI that turns speech into clear, polished writing in every app.

sections.headline: 4x faster than typing
sections.body: After 150 years of using the same keyboard, voice that actually works is finally here. When you create, code, and respond faster, you free up time for more. Speak naturally at the speed you think and let Flow handle the rest.

sections.headline: Used by professionals everywhere to speed up their thoughts

reusability.intent_preserved_if: shows recognizable brands in target market

sections.headline: Write faster in all your apps, on any device
sections.subheadline: Seamless speech-to-text in every application on your iPhone or computer.

segments.label: Teams
segments.hook: Fewer meetings, faster alignment, and a voice for everyone when it matters most.

segments.label: Students
segments.hook: Blank pages and looming deadlines? Flow's got you. Capture class notes, draft cover letters, and break through writer's block with minimal effort.

segments.label: Developers
segments.hook: Dictate in natural language and let Flow translate—perfect for Cursor, VS Code, or wherever you build.

segments.label: Creators
segments.hook: Ideas hit fast, but execution is slow. Breeze through unread DMs, comment replies, and draft content with your voice.

segments.label: Sales
segments.hook: Slow follow ups mean lost deals. With Flow, you can follow up instantly after meetings, personalize outreach, and punch up your pitch.

segments.label: Customer Support
segments.hook: Speak naturally to resolve tickets faster. Skip the script. Flow helps reps speak naturally while still sending perfect replies.

segments.label: Lawyers
segments.hook: Legal precision demands perfect transcription. Flow delivers smart dictation for contracts, case notes, and client records.

segments.label: Leaders
segments.hook: Who doesn't want faster teams and happier people? Flow delivers instant productivity your team will actually use.

segments.label: Accessibility
segments.hook: Your voice deserves a shortcut. Flow supports anyone who feels slowed down by a keyboard.

sections.headline: AI Auto Edits
sections.body: Speak naturally and Flow transcribes and edits your voice, instantly. Rambled thoughts become clear, perfectly formatted text, without the filler words or typos.

features.name: Personal dictionary
features.description: Flow automatically learns your unique words and adds them to your personal dictionary.

features.name: Snippet library
features.description: Create voice shortcuts for the things your team says over and over. From scheduling links to FAQs, just speak a cue and get the full formatted text.

features.name: Different tones for each app
features.description: Flow automatically adjusts tone based on the app you're using. Sound like you—not a robot.

features.name: 100+ languages
features.description: Flow automatically detects and transcribes in your language, letting you move between them—just like you do.

testimonials.quote: This is the best AI product I've used since ChatGPT.
testimonials.author: Rahul Vohra
testimonials.title: CEO, Superhuman

testimonials.quote: I have Parkinson's, and this app has just made my life so much easier using my Mac. I can't even explain the change that it has provided for me.
testimonials.author: Rich Pankey
testimonials.title: Indirect Sourcing Manager

testimonials.quote: I was able to dictate ~70% of our Q2 board doc with Wispr, it was a massive time saver!
testimonials.author: Jeff Seibert
testimonials.title: CEO, Digits AI

testimonials.quote: You're making texting actually delightful right now! Can see it becoming a can't live without product fast.
testimonials.author: Tara Tan
testimonials.title: Founding Partner at Strange Ventures

testimonials.quote: I'm afraid I'm getting addicted to this great platform. It allows me to get into a flow state and not have autocorrect or voice dictation stop and interrupt me while I'm attempting to articulate my ideas.
testimonials.author: Greg Dickson
testimonials.title: Bestselling Author and Business Coach

sections.headline: Start flowing
sections.subheadline: Effortless voice dictation in every application: 4x faster than typing, AI commands and auto-edits.
sections.availability: Available on Mac, Windows and iPhone

features.headline: Do more with your voice
features.subheadline: Voice-to-text that turns your thoughts into clear, polished text in any app or website.

feature_blocks.headline: Speak naturally. Flow writes it perfectly.
feature_blocks.body: Flow works wherever you work. Any app, device, or language.

features.name: Speak into any app
features.description: Flow works everywhere: Notion, Gmail, Google Docs, WhatsApp, Cursor, anything with a text field.

features.name: Spells names right
features.description: Flow uses surrounding context to spell uncommon names right.

features.name: Whisper
features.description: Flow even works when you're whispering.

feature_blocks.headline: Flow edits while you speak.
feature_blocks.body: Flow goes beyond basic dictation: cleaning up filler words, formatting lists, catching punctuation, and understanding corrections in real time.

features.name: Backtrack
features.description: Flow understands when you change your mind. Say 'Let's meet at 2… actually 3,' and Flow writes the corrected version instantly.

features.name: Remove fillers
features.description: Flow automatically removes 'um,' 'uh,' and other pauses.

features.name: Numbered lists
features.description: Just speak the numbers and Flow turns it into a formatted list.

features.name: Auto punctuation
features.description: Flow detects punctuation naturally from your pauses and tone.

feature_blocks.headline: Flow adapts to you.
feature_blocks.body: Flow learns your words, phrases, and tone, and keeps them consistent across every app and device.

feature_blocks.headline: Work better together with shared voice tools.
feature_blocks.body: Flow helps teams move faster with shared context, consistent language, and tools that keep everyone aligned.

feature_blocks.headline: Built for developers, not just dictation.
feature_blocks.body: Flow understands syntax, file names, and code formatting so your voice fits seamlessly into your workflow.

pricing.headline: Start Flowing today
pricing.subheadline: Download the app to get started with 14 days of Flow Pro for free. No credit card required.

plans.name: Flow Basic
features: 2,000 words per week on Mac or Windows
1,000 words per week on Flow for iPhone

plans.name: Flow Pro
features: Unlimited words per week on Mac, Windows, and iPhone

plans.name: Flow Enterprise
plans.target: For teams who need advanced security & support
features: SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 compliance

special_offers.students: 3 months free and 50% off Pro plan

about.mission: We are a team of designers, AI researchers, and engineers who step away from the status quo to rethink the fundamental layer of computing — how humans interact with technology.
about.vision: Our mission is to make interacting with your devices as effortless as talking to a close friend.
values: We care about building intelligence that mimics humans.
We care about designing with incredible attention to detail.
We care about building experiences that feel intuitive.
We care about building software that seamlessly fits into your life.

privacy.headline: Privacy & Security
privacy.subheadline: We've built Flow with privacy and control front and center, whether you're an individual or a business.

key_features.name: Privacy Mode
key_features.description: Zero data retention. When it's on, your dictation data isn't stored or used for model training.

key_features.name: Encryption
key_features.description: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

key_features.name: BAA
key_features.description: Business Associate Agreement available for HIPAA compliance.

headline_formulas.example: Work better together with shared voice tools
Built for developers, not just dictation
